item.title: Medline Industries, LP: Medline Convenience kits containing recalled Swan-Ganz Catheters CARDIAC MAJOR DYNJ901328G HEART A DYNJ903465K OPEN HEART DYNJ909090G SILVER Recall
item.product: Medline Convenience kits containing recalled Swan-Ganz Catheters CARDIAC MAJOR DYNJ901328G HEART A DYNJ903465K OPEN HEART DYNJ909090G SILVER
item.summary: Kits contain Swan-Ganz catheters recalled by Becton Dickinson (BD). BD has received complaints of leaks/breakage involving failures of the (blue) proximal injectate lumen hub on these catheters. This has led to instances of leakage, lumen damage, and breakage, and may lead to infection, medication loss, and/or blood loss. Product details: Medline Convenience kits containing recalled Swan-Ganz Catheters CARDIAC MAJOR DYNJ901328G HEART A DYNJ903465K OPEN HEART DYNJ909090G SILVER CROSS OPEN HEART DYNJ906102M VPH OPEN HEART DYNJ902664M DYNJ902664N
item.affectedPeople: US Nationwide distribution in the states of AZ, CA, FL, IL, MO, NJ, OH, OK, TN, TX, WI.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
